description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a spacious front porch, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and mature trees. The house features a symmetrical facade with evenly spaced windows and a double garage on one side. The backyard includes a patio area and landscaped garden beds, while the driveway leads directly to the street. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof shingles. The property is enclosed by a low fence and bordered by a sidewalk, making it suitable for a suburban neighborhood. The overall design reflects a classic Craftsman style with modern touches and ample outdoor space.
description: A single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, double garage, and landscaped yard surrounded by mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, front porch, double garage, and main entrance with a landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, driveway, and the arrangement of trees and garden beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and the symmetrical window arrangement on the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional trees, and the connection between the driveway and the street.
